title: seseli montanum subsp. peixotoanum
intro: Seseli montanum subsp. peixotoanum is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to Portugal. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, such as reducing respiratory issues, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive problems. Seseli montanum subsp. peixotoanum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
